problem id: 084a4496
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  10011101 -> 10110010
  00001010 -> 01000001
  00010001 -> 00100010
  00011011 -> 01100011
  01111010 -> 01001111
  10000001 -> 00110001
  11000100 -> 10011001
  10011110 -> 11010010
  10111001 -> 00110110

query: 00111110
predicted answer: 11000111
